tasks.description: Comments system — data model + types + API routes + client wrappers [1/3]
acceptance_criteria: New migration 014_comments.sql creates: comment_category enum (note/decision/pain_point/idea/question), commentable_type enum reusing annotatable_type or new enum (step/section/touchpoint/stage), comments table with id, workspace_id, commentable_type, commentable_id, parent_id (nullable self-FK for threading), author_id (FK users), content (text NOT NULL), category (comment_category NOT NULL DEFAULT 'note'), is_resolved (boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT false), created_at, updated_at
RLS policies on comments table using can_access_workspace(workspace_id) — SELECT/INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE
Updated_at trigger, indexes on workspace_id, commentable_type+commentable_id, parent_id
Comment and CommentCategory types added to src/types/database.ts, re-exported from index.ts
CommentableType type added (reuse AnnotatableType or define separately — prefer reuse if identical enum values)
API route GET /api/v1/comments — filterable by workspace_id (required), commentable_type, commentable_id, category, is_resolved. Returns Comment[] ordered by created_at asc
API route POST /api/v1/comments — creates comment with validation (workspace_id required, commentable_type validated, content required). Sets author_id from session user. Returns 201
API route PATCH /api/v1/comments/[id] — updates content, category, is_resolved. Returns updated comment
API route DELETE /api/v1/comments/[id] — deletes comment (cascades to replies via parent_id FK). Returns 204
Client wrappers in lib/api/client.ts: fetchComments(workspaceId, filters?), createComment(data), updateComment(id, data), deleteComment(id)
All API routes check for null data after mutations (RLS silent mutation pattern from BUG-013)
Type check passes, lint passes, build passes

patterns_to_follow: Polymorphic commentable_type enum — same values as annotatable_type (step/section/touchpoint/stage). Consider reusing annotatable_type enum in migration if Postgres allows, otherwise create commentable_type separately
RLS policies: use can_access_workspace(workspace_id) directly since comments have workspace_id (simpler than annotations which join through perspectives)
API routes: follow annotations/route.ts pattern — auth check, validation, PGRST116 detection, envelope response
Client wrappers: follow fetchAnnotations/createAnnotation pattern in client.ts
Types: follow PerspectiveAnnotation interface pattern in database.ts
learnings_relevant: Supabase RLS silent mutations — check data is not null after mutations, return 403
apiFetch unwraps envelope — client functions return apiFetch<T>() directly

tasks.special_instructions: FEAT-045 is L complexity overall — decomposed into 3 sub-tasks. This is [1/3] data layer only. [2/3] comment panel UI and [3/3] canvas badges + workspace comments view will follow in subsequent iterations. The commentable_type enum values match annotatable_type exactly (step/section/touchpoint/stage) — in Postgres you can reuse the same enum type if desired, OR create a new one for clarity. Either approach is fine. parent_id self-FK enables threading: ON DELETE CASCADE so deleting a parent deletes all replies. author_id should reference auth.users(id) not the users table if that's the pattern used elsewhere — check migration 003 for the FK pattern.

tasks.description: Add hex color format validation to perspective API routes
acceptance_criteria: POST /api/v1/perspectives validates color field matches /^#[0-9A-Fa-f]{6}$/i — returns 400 if invalid
PATCH /api/v1/perspectives/[id] validates color field (if provided) matches same regex — returns 400 if invalid
Validation only runs when color is provided (it has a DEFAULT in DB, so omission is fine)

patterns_to_follow: Validation guard before DB insert — return errorResponse('validation', message, 400)
Same pattern as rating validation in annotations POST (BUG-015 fix)

tasks.special_instructions: Simple regex validation. The suggested fix from IMP-001 is exact: if (color && !/^#[0-9A-Fa-f]{6}$/i.test(color)) return errorResponse('validation', 'Invalid color format. Use hex format: #RRGGBB', 400)

shared_files.note: FEAT-045 owns database.ts and client.ts. IMP-001 does not touch these files.

testing_plan.regression_reason: Last regression at iter 64. Due at iter 72 (every 8th). Not yet triggered.
